evals.name: System ID with Streaming LMS
evals.description: Natural prompt: identify unknown system. Tests whether agent uses dsp.LMSFilter and calls maxstep().
evals.prompt: Identify an unknown 32-tap FIR system using LMS adaptive filtering in streaming mode. Process 200 frames of 128 samples each. After convergence, compare estimated weights to true system.

assertions.description: Uses dsp.LMSFilter System object
Calls maxstep() for step size selection
Extracts weights via 3rd output (not .Coefficients)
assertions.expected: Uses [y, e, w] or [~, ~, w] three-output syntax on dsp.LMSFilter call

assertions.description: Does NOT use deprecated adaptfilt.* API
Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

evals.name: Active Noise Control
evals.description: Natural prompt: build ANC system. Tests whether agent uses dsp.FilteredXLMSFilter.
evals.prompt: Build a feedforward active noise control system. The secondary path is a 16-tap FIR filter. First estimate the secondary path, then use it in the ANC controller to cancel a broadband noise source.

assertions.description: Uses dsp.FilteredXLMSFilter for ANC controller
Sets SecondaryPathEstimate property on dsp.FilteredXLMSFilter
assertions.expected: Must set SecondaryPathEstimate property on dsp.FilteredXLMSFilter; fails if only SecondaryPathCoefficients is set or if secondary path estimate is not provided to the object

assertions.description: Does NOT implement sample-by-sample manual loop
Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

evals.name: Long Filter Low Latency
evals.description: Natural prompt: long echo cancellation filter with latency constraint. Tests FDAF partitioned mode.
evals.prompt: I need to identify a 2048-tap room impulse response for echo cancellation. Processing must use 128-sample blocks for 8ms latency at 16kHz. Time-domain LMS is too expensive at this length.

assertions.description: Uses dsp.FrequencyDomainAdaptiveFilter
Uses Partitioned constrained FDAF method
Sets BlockLength to 128 (not equal to Length)
assertions.expected: BlockLength property set to 128, separate from Length of 2048

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

evals.name: Noise Cancellation with RLS
evals.description: Natural prompt requiring fast convergence. Tests whether agent uses dsp.RLSFilter instead of manual implementation.
evals.prompt: Design adaptive noise cancellation for a signal corrupted through an unknown 12-tap path. I need very fast convergence - the environment changes rapidly. Use recursive least squares.

assertions.description: Uses dsp.RLSFilter System object
Sets ForgettingFactor property
Extracts weights via .Coefficients property
Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

evals.name: Freeze Adaptation After Convergence
evals.description: Tests AdaptInputPort usage for freezing weights while continuing to filter.
evals.prompt: Identify a 24-tap system with NLMS. After 5000 samples, freeze the adapted weights but keep the filter running on new data to verify performance.

assertions.description: Uses dsp.LMSFilter with Normalized LMS
Sets AdaptInputPort to true
Calls maxstep() for step size
Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

evals.name: Correlated Input Algorithm Selection
evals.description: Natural prompt: NLMS is too slow on AR input. Tests routing to dsp.AffineProjectionFilter with System object (not manual).
evals.prompt: I'm running NLMS on an AR(4) colored noise input and convergence is very slow — 10x slower than expected. I need something faster than NLMS but cheaper than RLS. Implement the solution and compare convergence speed against NLMS.

assertions.description: Uses dsp.AffineProjectionFilter System object
Sets ProjectionOrder property
Does NOT implement sample-by-sample manual loop
Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

evals.name: Low-Complexity Embedded Adaptive Filter
evals.description: Tests routing to sign-based LMS for no-multiply constraint, plus trap awareness (InitialConditions, no maxstep).
evals.prompt: Implement a low-complexity adaptive filter for an embedded system with no hardware multiplier. The weight update must avoid multiplications entirely. Identify a 16-tap unknown system in streaming mode (200 frames of 64 samples). Verify convergence.

assertions.description: Sets Method property to a sign-based LMS variant
Sets non-zero InitialConditions to prevent sign(0)=0 stall
assertions.expected: InitialConditions set to small non-zero values (e.g., 0.001*ones or similar)

assertions.description: Uses dsp.LMSFilter System object without calling maxstep
assertions.expected: Code uses dsp.LMSFilter AND does not call maxstep()

assertions.description: Sets StepSize property to conservative value for sign-based LMS
Code converges below -10 dB misalignment

evals.name: Inverse System Identification
evals.description: Natural prompt: channel equalization. Tests whether agent uses dsp.RLSFilter with correct inverse topology.
evals.prompt: Design an adaptive equalizer that finds the inverse of an unknown 12-tap FIR channel. The equalizer should undo the channel distortion so that the cascade (channel × equalizer) approximates a flat frequency response. I need fast convergence since the channel may change. Process 3000 samples and validate by plotting the cascade magnitude response.

assertions.description: Uses dsp.RLSFilter System object
Does NOT implement sample-by-sample manual loop
Extracts weights via .Coefficients property
Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
